name_cn:

Style No.: 498156 Small
Size: 26x18x10cm
Padlock Small Shopping Bag
Small and slightly refined, very reasonable capacity and absolutely sufficient! Suitable for casual or formal occasions, commuting to work, and equally not heavy. The leather shoulder strap is more comfortable to carry! Exquisite, durable, understated, and versatile.
